proofDocuments.description: IPFS CIDs for PDF proof documents

items.description: IPFS CID (v0 or v1), without protocol prefix (e.g. no ipfs://)

holdingWalletAddress.description: Solana wallet address (base58) holding wine NFTs

transactionHashes.description: On-chain transaction hashes relevant to this proof (Solana)

items.description: Transaction hash/signature: 0x-prefixed 32-byte EVM hash or base58 Solana signature

nftMints.description: Solana NFT mint addresses (each uniquely identifies an NFT)
